title: Master Index Blueprint (Part 3)
normalized_content:
Phase 0.5A – Master Index Blueprint (Part 3)
Organization: Aetheris BioPharma Private Limited
Scope: Enterprise document repository index – Part 3 (Change Control, Risk, PQR,
Management Review, Audits, Complaints, Investigations, CAPAs, Cross-Links)
Date: 2026-07-11
Version: R0
This document completes the Master Index Blueprint for Aetheris BioPharma. All entries are
consistent with Phases 0.1–0.4 (organization, QMS, operational records, historical
knowledge, and incoming quality event).

This pattern is extended across all major products, equipment, suppliers, and quality events.
27. How to Use This Master Index in Helix
● Treat every row as a node in the knowledge graph.
● Use the “Related” columns to build edges:
○ Complaint → Investigation → CAPA → Equipment → Product → Batch → Supplier.

○ Change Control → SOP → Equipment → Risk Assessment.
○ PQR → CAPAs → Complaints → Batches.
● Distinguish between:
○ Detailed documents (full content available).
○ Indexed-only entries (metadata only; Helix knows they exist but has no full text).
This mirrors real enterprises where not every record is fully digitized or content-rich, but the
system still knows about their existence and relationships.
